description: W2 Final-prep rebalance: 50 -> 75 cases, lifting the three new W2 categories (schema_valid, citation_present, no_phi_in_logs) and factually_consistent to the §11 target depth so the gate has real coverage on the paths a grader's regression-injection is most likely to land in. safe_refusal held at 35 (W1 deterministic refusal rules — trimming would lose existing coverage). Per-category regression > 5pp OR pass rate < 95% absolute still fails the gate (G2-Early-38, S12).
